text.title: Cross-Role Handoff Protocol — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a single handoff sign-off record. The agent assembling or auditing handoffs must produce records that satisfy this contract.

field.name: handoff_pair
field.format: enum: ba-to-architect | architect-to-dev | dev-to-qa | qa-to-devops | custom-pair

field.name: status
field.format: enum: approved | rejected | needs-info | expedite-approved | reversed | amended

forbidden.pattern: sign_off_owner is a team name, channel name, or group ("the QA team", "#eng")
status=approved while one or more acceptance_gate_items.passed == false
rejection_reason is "not ready" / "needs more work" / "see Slack" without a specific artifact or gate-item reference
edit to an existing sign-off record — new amendments must be a new record with status=amended pointing to prior
parallel downstream work logged in the ticket BEFORE this handoff's approved status timestamp (excluding documented expedite path)
delta_since_previous missing when previous_sign_off exists for the same handoff_pair

allowed-transformations.transformation: Bundle artifacts may be deduplicated (same Figma frame referenced twice) — record only once.
Acceptance-gate items may be grouped into one record entry when the gate template explicitly defines the group (e.g., "OWASP checks (5 items)").
Sign-off may be delegated by the named owner BEFORE the gate is hit, recorded as a "delegated-to" field; the delegate becomes the sign_off_owner.

section.title: Self-check checklist (run before submitting a sign-off record)

list.item: sign_off_owner is a single named individual (r1)
status matches actual gate state — no "approved" with failing items (r4 + f2)
bundle_artifacts are all linked / fetchable from the ticket
delta_since_previous is filled if this is not the first sign-off for the pair (r2)
rejection_reason cites specific items, not vague language (r4)
no prior record was modified to produce this submission (r5)
